station_address: Zakaria Bunder Rd, near Cotton Green Railway Station, Cotton Green West, Abhyudaya Nagar, Sewri, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400033
text:
- Easily noticeable and reachable petrol pump.
- Located exactly beside Cotton Green Station (West) at CST end. This is also a mouth of 5 road joints. Hence it becomes very easy to access this petrol station for every vehicle.
- Available for almost 18-20 hours of a total day. Which is quiet enough.
- Petrol, Diesel, CNG and Air stations are available.
- For CNG, the waiting time is around 10-15 minutes at prime time like morning and evening which is quite satisfactory.
- The Air station used to be closed many times.
- The staff is well dressed.
- Available payment options are Cash/Card/Paytm.
- ❌Charges Some Rs extra on PUC. Also they use fake black stamps on PUC paper which shows fake GST amount.
